landing.heroDescription: Create stunning educational images, presentations, activities, worksheets, and video storyboards in seconds. Let AI do the heavy lifting so you can focus on what matters most - your students.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything You Need to Create Amazing Content
landing.demoSubtitle: Watch how teachers create amazing educational content in just 60 seconds
landing.demoPlaySubtext: See how easy it is to create lesson materials
landing.sampleSubtitle: Real examples created by teachers using BrightBoard
landing.testimonialSubtitle: Join thousands of educators creating better lessons with AI
landing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about BrightBoard
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join teachers worldwide who are saving hours every week with AI-powered content creation. Start free today - no credit card required.
landing.faq1Answer: Simply describe what you want to create, and our AI generates professional educational content in seconds. You can create images, presentations, worksheets, interactive games, video storyboards, and text content for any subject and grade level.
landing.faq2Answer: Yes! Our free tier gives you 5 content generations per day. This is perfect for trying out the platform and creating essential materials for your lessons.
landing.faq3Question: What types of content can I create?
landing.faq3Answer: BrightBoard supports 6 content types: educational images, complete presentations with speaker notes, printable worksheets, interactive games (like Lucky Spinner and Memory Match), video storyboards with AI narration, and text content like stories and explanations.
landing.faq4Question: Can I use the content in my classroom?
landing.faq4Answer: Absolutely! All content you generate is yours to use in your classroom, share with students, print, or include in your teaching materials. Premium users get watermark-free content.
landing.faq5Answer: BrightBoard supports 11 languages including English, French, Spanish, Portuguese, Arabic, Hindi, Swahili, Zulu, Mandarin Chinese, Vietnamese, and Luganda. You can generate content and use the interface in any of these languages.
landing.faq6Answer: Our games like Lucky Spinner, Memory Match, and Quiz Show are fully playable online. Simply generate the game, then play it directly in your browser or share the link with your students for remote learning.

contentTypes.imageDesc: Generate beautiful, classroom-ready illustrations that bring concepts to life

contentTypes.textDesc: Generate stories, explanations, and learning materials tailored to any grade level

contentTypes.storyboardDesc: Plan animated educational videos with frame-by-frame visual guides
contentTypes.worksheetDesc: Generate printable worksheets with questions, fill-in-blanks, and more
